2606.09764.title: iOSWorld: A Benchmark for Personally Intelligent Phone Agents
2606.09764.paper_summary: A useful phone agent needs to be personally intelligent. It should reason over a user's identity, history, and preferences as they exist on the device, not just follow isolated instructions in an impersonal sandbox. Existing mobile agent benchmarks lack this kind of personalization. We introduce iOSWorld, the first interactive native iOS simulator benchmark built around a persistent user identity spanning 26 newly built iOS apps. These apps contain connected data such as transactions, messages, travel records, social relationships, and financial activity. iOSWorld includes 133 tasks across three increasingly difficult categories. Single-app tasks (27) test one app, multi-app tasks (60) span 2 to 8 apps, and memory and personalization tasks (46) require agents to infer patterns from personal data. We evaluate frontier and open-source computer-use models in both vision-only and privileged vision+XML settings. The best configuration reaches 52\% overall but only 37\% on multi-app tasks. Privileged vision+XML access improves frontier models by up to 26 percentage points, while smaller models do not benefit from added accessibility-tree input. We release iOSWorld as an open-source benchmark with all apps, seeded data, tasks, rubrics, and evaluation code.
2606.09764.paper_summary_zh: 一個有用的電話代理需要具備個人智能。它應該根據用戶在設備上的身份、歷史和偏好進行推理，而不僅僅是在一個無人情味的沙盒中遵循孤立的指令。現有的移動代理基準缺乏這種個性化。我們介紹了iOSWorld，這是第一個圍繞持久用戶身份構建的互動式原生iOS模擬基準，涵蓋26個新建的iOS應用程序。這些應用程序包含連接的數據，如交易、消息、旅行記錄、社交關係和財務活動。iOSWorld包括三個難度逐漸增加的類別，共有133個任務。單應用任務（27個）測試一個應用，多應用任務（60個）跨越2到8個應用，而記憶和個性化任務（46個）要求代理從個人數據中推斷模式。我們在僅限視覺和特權視覺+XML設置中評估前沿和開源計算模型。最佳配置的整體達到52\%，但在多應用任務中僅為37\%。特權視覺+XML訪問使前沿模型提高了多達26個百分點，而較小的模型則未從額外的可訪問性樹輸入中受益。我們將iOSWorld作為開源基準發布，包含所有應用程序、種子數據、任務、評分標準和評估代碼。
2606.09764.author: Lawrence Keunho Jang et.al.
2606.09764.authors: Lawrence Keunho Jang, Mareks Woodside, Geronimo Carom, Andrew Keunwoo Jang, Jing Yu Koh, Ruslan Salakhutdinov
